description: --rsc omitted: CPU default flow should expose default-derived SLURM_RSC_* and OMP_*
script:
echo cpu-defaults
printenv SLURM_RSC_SPEC || true
printenv SLURM_RSC_P || true
printenv SLURM_RSC_T || true
printenv SLURM_RSC_C || true
printenv SLURM_RSC_M || true
printenv OMP_NUM_THREADS || true
printenv OMP_PROC_BIND || true
printenv OMP_PLACES || true
